request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who's lived through so much change, I can tell you: we can't afford to be naive about security anymore. The world's too unpredictable. Our agencies need the tools to act decisively when threats emerge. Remember what happened in [REDACTED CITY] last year? That could have been so much worse if our people weren't already watching. We can't let activists tie our hands with endless debates while real dangers grow. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
